title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: The corridor begins to gently curve here and the metal shelves curve with it, forged from sweeping, parabolic pieces of iron.  Fractured grey glaesine fragments of varying size litter the floor, scattered from the chipped and broken remains of the panels that formerly lined the shelving.  A small sitting area is built part-way through the area, featuring a wide iron bench surrounded by books, scrolls, and loose parchment.
